description.earned: Congrats! You've reached the Bronze tier in the WOW Arcade. You're part of the vibrant community and have unlocked essential workshops and games.
description.default: Learn how to build modern web and mobile applications while playing games. Reach the Bronze tier to unlock this badge!

description.earned: Outstanding! Your Silver badge proves your dedication to mastering technical challenges at WOW 2026.
description.default: Step up your game! Finish mid-level challenges to earn the Silver Badge and better event discounts.

description.earned: Incredible work! The Gold badge signifies top-tier commitment and high-ranking performance in the arcade.
description.default: Rise to the top 150! Gold members get priority entry and premium swags.

description.earned: Phenomenal! You are among the elite. The Diamond badge gives you exclusive access to expert-led workshop sessions.
description.default: Be part of the top 50! Gain the Diamond badge for ultimate bragging rights and deep discounts.

description.earned: Guest of Honour! Your Platinum status means you've conquered the arcade. Your ticket is on us!
description.default: The ultimate prize. Reach the top 10 to receive a full refund and become a Guest of Honour.
